title: SignalDesk LLM prompt payload v1
description: Guarded structured input contract for optional LLM explanations. The payload contains only a validated SignalDesk signal_card, fixed guardrails, explicit explanation requirements, required signal fact paths, untrusted-text labels, excluded-field labels, and the strict explanation output schema.

guardrails.description: Fixed instructions constraining the LLM to structured SignalDesk facts only.

explanation_requirements.description: Fixed explanation-only requirements: summarize deterministic TA state, cite facts used, include risks/unavailable context, and avoid trade instructions.

required_signal_fact_paths.description: Signal-card paths for state, momentum, confirmation/invalidation levels, and classification reasons that LLM explanations should consider when present.

untrusted_provider_text_fields.description: Signal-card paths whose provider/news text must be treated as untrusted data.

excluded_signal_card_fields.description: Signal-card fields intentionally removed or nulled before prompt construction.

signal_card.description: Canonical SignalDesk signal_card object validated by backend contracts before prompt construction. Narrative must be null.
